meta.name: Real handmade product fixture for local MVP
meta.imageStrategy: remote-url-only; no generated images; no downloaded images
pricingPolicy: eBay raw prices are already stored as VND in the source file.
Shopify source prices are preserved as USD in priceText and converted to VND with VND_PER_USD=25500 for local checkout compatibility.
dataPolicy: Product title, price, imageUrl, itemWebUrl and crawledAt come from local raw crawl files.
Shopify product descriptions come from public products.json body_html after HTML stripping.
Product category/tags/attributes can include deterministic inference from title/type/tags and are marked in attributes.
Seller accounts are local importer wrappers because raw product feeds do not include full marketplace seller identities.
No customer PII, real orders, or real reviews are included.

products.name: “Trillium No. 2” Tetra Pak Print
products.description: Today we share with you a new kind of adventure. I have been – for the last 97 days – learning the technique of dry point printing through observing the world around me, focusing on the day-to-day life of a flower, a goose couple, and of course, Pearl. Each year I set out on an adventure to learn a new process which helps me share Peg and Awl treasures whilst simultaneously offering me ever-desired new ways of seeing and storytelling. This collection – Little Windows – is made of trash and scrap from engraving to framing, and each little work is unique. I am hand-printing editions of 10 of each piece. PS: In addition to using trash as my sub straight, I’ve printed on scrap paper from journals we make at Peg and Awl. Walter made frames out of scrap FSC certified oak from furniture and other treasures we make here. I used the rest of the wood scrap to heat up our sauna on Temperature Terrace, stop 6 on the map. The framer, too, rejoiced in using their scrap museum glass and board for the framing. Tetra Pak Printing Tetra Pak is a Swedish company that specializes in their iconic and sustainable paper-based cartons, used for milks, broths, and my favourite ‚Äî rose water! It is also a magical carton, in which, after enjoying and washing the contents, can be cut apart and used as a plate for print making using the dry point method. With a sharp tool, engraving into the silver side of the plate is relatively simple. After engraving, the ink is spread onto the plate then wiped off, so ink remains in the engraved lines and wherever else darkness is desired. After wetting and blotting the paper, a sandwich of felt, scrap paper, inked plate, wet paper, top felt, is made ready for the press. After rolling the sandwich through the press, the etching comes to life! Each of these prints was made in this way with much trial and error and discovery! The frames were made in from scrap FSC certified Oak, scrap museum glass and matt board, making this a solidly ecologically sound treasure.

With a sharp tool, engraving into the silver side of the plate is relatively simple. After engraving, the ink is spread onto the plate then wiped off, so ink remains in the engraved lines and wherever else darkness is desired. After wetting and blotting the paper, a sandwich of felt, scrap paper, inked plate, wet paper, top felt, is made ready for the press. After rolling the sandwich through the press, the etching comes to life! Each of these prints was made in this way with much trial and error and discovery! The frames were made in from scrap FSC certified Oak, scrap museum glass and matt board, making this a solidly ecologically sound treasure.

products.name: Square Handled Basket
products.description: Set your table simply with this minimalist Square Handled Basket hand-woven from date palm leaves by artisans working with Rishilpi. Our fair trade partner Rishilpi trains and supports artisans in rural Bangladesh.

products.name: Cat Nap Velvet Sleep Mask
products.description: Take a cue from our feline friends and have yourself a cat nap. Featuring a soft velvet backing, this sleep mask is constructed by makers working with Saidpur Enterprises in Bangladesh, which provides sustainable jobs for women who lack employment opportunities.

products.name: Fox Measuring Tape
products.description: Featuring a hand-crocheted cotton cover, the Fox Measuring Tape is a whimsical and utilitarian gift for the budding architect or engineer in your life. The measuring tape is small and light, so they can easily keep the tool at the ready in their backpack. With design assistance and training from our fair trade partner Craft Link, artisans in Vietnam are earning sustainable livelihoods.

products.name: Redondo Teak Pizza Cutting Board
products.description: This round teak wood pizza board is designed for both prep and presentation, featuring a sturdy wooden handle for easy carrying from kitchen to table. Finished with food-safe mineral oil to highlight the rich, natural wood tones. A versatile essential for pizza nights, charcuterie spreads and everyday entertaining. Handcrafted in Guatemala. Note: Due to variations of grain, color and pattern in natural wood, each board will be uniquely one of a kind.

products.name: Fiesta Teak Cutting Board 13
products.description: Add a touch of beauty to everyday prep with this handsomely crafted teak wood cutting board, featuring rich, natural wood tones. Perfect for slicing citrus, prepping herbs or serving small bites in style, a sturdy leather handle is secured at the top edge, making it easy to hang or carry from kitchen to table. Finished with mineral oil to enhance the grain and durability, this compact board is a practical, timeless essential for any kitchen. Handcrafted in Guatemala. Note: Due to variations of grain, color and pattern in natural wood, each board will be uniquely one of a kind.

products.name: Amor Teak Cutting Board Duo
products.description: This set of two durable handled teak wood cutting boards is ready to move from countertop to table. Hand-carved in matching silhouettes, each board features a sculpted loop handle and softly rounded edges for an elevated, artisan finish. Crafted from richly grained teak and polished with mineral oil, the natural wood tones bring warmth to kitchen prep and effortless charm to charcuterie spreads. Handcrafted in Guatemala. Note: Due to variations of grain, color and pattern in natural wood, each board will be uniquely one of a kind.

products.name: Fiesta Teak Cutting Board 16.5
products.description: Crafted from richly grained teak wood, this large rectangular cutting board is designed for everyday prep and effortless serving. Smoothly finished and treated with mineral oil to enhance its natural beauty, each board showcases warm, organic wood tones that make every piece one of a kind. A sturdy leather handle, securely fastened at the top edge, adds rustic character and makes it easy to hang or carry from kitchen to table. Handcrafted in Guatemala. Note: Due to variations of grain, color and pattern in natural wood, each board will be uniquely one of a kind.

products.name: Fiesta Teak Cutting Board 20
products.description: Perfect for everyday prep or elegant presentation, this cutting board is made from richly grained teak wood and finished with mineral oil. Showcasing warm, natural tones that only grow more beautiful with time, the sleek silhouette makes it great for slicing baguettes, serving charcuterie or styling a countertop display. A genuine leather handle, secured at the top edge, adds both function and a refined finishing touch for easy hanging and effortless entertaining. Handcrafted in Guatemala. Note: Due to variations of grain, color and pattern in natural wood, each board will be uniquely one of a kind.

products.name: Jhapa Drip Glaze Mug
products.description: This 16-ounce clay mug features a rich blue base with a flowing blue-green drip glaze that cascades naturally down its sides, making each piece beautifully unique. Slightly wider at the bottom and gently tapered at the top, it’s as comfortable in your hands as it is striking on your table. Handcrafted by fair trade artisans at Association for Craft Producers (ACP) in Nepal, a nonprofit group that provides design, marketing, management and technical guidance; fair, steady wages and a comprehensive array of medical, educational and financial services to low-income artisans, the majority of whom are women. Coordinates with 5905420 and 5905440.

products.name: Zaina Floral Blockprint Napkin
products.description: Set a warm and inviting table with this vibrant hand block-printed cotton napkin. Featuring a bold floral center framed by twin vine borders, each 20" square is a celebration of artisan tradition in rich red, blue, green and yellow on crisp white. Sustainably made, beautifully timeless . Handcrafted in India by the artisans of Craft Resource Center Pvt. Ltd. (CRC), a guaranteed Fair Trade Organization creating sustainable income opportunities for marginalized communities by blending traditional skills and ethical practices with globally competitive design, quality and innovation while preserving the dignity of labor and empowering artisans through fair trade, technology and skill development. Coordinates with 6896580 .

products.name: Linen Bread Bag Set
products.description: Keep your bread fresher, longer with a naturally elegant touch. This set of two 100% linen bread bags is not only breathable and sustainable, but also anti-microbial, helping to prevent mold and odors naturally. Each reusable bag helps preserve crusty texture while reducing plastic waste and is adorned with a charming, printed wheat pattern. Durable, washable and beautifully simple, they’re a must-have for any eco-conscious kitchen. Handcrafted in India.

products.name: Turtle Measuring Tape
products.description: This uniquely adorable measuring tape takes an ordinary household staple and turns it into a fun tool you will look forward to using! The sweet, crocheted turtle design with soft 3D head, arms and legs will make you smile each and every time you pull out this handy measuring tape. Handcrafted in Vietnam.

products.name: Dog Measuring Tape
products.description: This uniquely adorable measuring tape takes an ordinary household staple and turns it into a fun tool you will look forward to using! The sweet, happy crocheted dog design with soft 3D ears will make you smile each and every time you pull out this handy measuring tape. Handcrafted in Vietnam.

products.name: Navi Multistrand Beaded Necklace
products.description: The Navi Multistrand Beaded Necklace makes a stylish statement with seven dazzling strands of beads on Zari thread. Shine bright and stand out in this unique piece, perfect for any occasion. Crafted by hand by artisans in India with TARA Projects.

products.name: Little Kitty Oven Mitts
products.description: Protect those paws with these little kitty pot holders. Fitting just over the palms, great for grabbing hot lids, handles and pulling pans from the oven. Easy to store and adorable to hang just in reach. Each face is hand embroidered by skilled artisans with Mahaguthi, mostly women, who work in their homes in rural, mountainous regions of Nepal. Fabric is handloomed, and upcycled offcuts from garment waste from the sewing workshop are often incorporated into designs. Each pair is a different color.

products.name: Silver Flower Ring
products.description: Textured and refined, add this six-petaled ring to bring a touch of nature with you everywhere you go. Handcrafted by artisans with Craft Resource Center, helping informally organized artisan groups develop self-sustaining businesses, increasing wages by 200%.

products.name: Snowy Star Garland

products.name: Find Your Way Compass Necklace

Whether you're hiking or simply exploring a new city, this compass necklace gives you the confidence and peace of mind to always find your way. Ethically handcrafted in small batches by artisans in India working with Noah's Ark International Exports. What began in 1986 out of one family's home in Moradabad, is now a business of 20 independent fair trade workshops.
